name: Snicker Pie
recipeIngredient: Graham cracker crust for a pie dish or layer
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the graham cracker crust according to your preferred recipe.
2. In a double boiler, melt the snicker bars and peanut butter together.
3. Add half-and-half to the melted mixture and stir until smooth.
4. Fold in the cool whip until well combined.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared crust and refrigerate for 4-5 hours.
6. Before serving, top with additional cool whip and chocolate syrup.
